nodes.name: Inbound Trigger
nodes.notes: Replace with webhook or scheduled poller per platform

nodes.name: Verify Signature Or Cursor
nodes.notes: Validate webhook signature or poll cursor before any mutation

nodes.name: Normalize To Work Item
nodes.notes: Map raw platform payload into work-item.schema.json fields

nodes.name: Dedupe Gate
nodes.notes: Reject duplicate delivery ids or existing dedupe keys

nodes.name: Create Or Update GitHub Issue
nodes.notes: Issue-first: accepted work becomes a GitHub issue before execution

nodes.name: Bootstrap PR Watcher Contract
nodes.notes: Attach watcherRequired, watcherConfigRef, and repo-governance context
